ab: Ga Mhebu ka sapah mu yaku.
Rima hei kana ka tnsapah miyan.
en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: Ga ku suupu meniq tama mu, bubu mu, qbsuran mu rseno ma qbsuran mu mqedil.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: Bbaro hnyegan na ka tama mu, kesacu ka heya.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: Rqeling ka bubu mu, ga mgu-ising ka heya.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: Rngagun nami na kari Seediq meniq sapah ka tama mu.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the ethnic language with us at home.

ab: Rbagan ka sngayan laqi muuyas de meyah ku alang klaali.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: Suupu nami mosa qmerac qpatun yami ka qbsuran mu rsemo ma, qbsuran mu mqedil.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Kuxul mu riyung ka seediq tnsapah mu.
en: I like our family very much.
